bundles.name: Tally Hosting

bundles.name: M365 Integration
bundles.tagline: SharePoint documents, Outlook ingestion, Teams + Copilot.
features: Single Sign-On via Microsoft Entra ID

bundles.name: Power Query, Power BI, Power Automate & Workflow
bundles.tagline: Automation, analytics, and reporting on top of your data.
features: Embedded Power BI reports with Row-Level Security

bundles.name: Audit Suite
bundles.tagline: End-to-end audit automation — workpapers, exception engine, AI reviewer, signed report.
features: Statutory + GST + Internal Controls audit programs
Auto-generated workpaper checklist with risk + assertion mapping
Materiality + variance exception engine on Tally / bank / GST data
Multi-level reviewer sign-off with immutable audit trail
Copilot Audit Reviewer (Q&A over workpapers, draft observations)
One-click Word + PDF final audit report

bundles.name: All-in-One
bundles.tagline: Everything above, at the best value.
